name: TEE IT UP GOLF STUDIO
about: Tee it Up Golf Studio is an indoor golf simulation venue located in Lindale, Texas, offering a comprehensive golfing experience for players of all skill levels. The facility utilizes advanced golf simulators that provide instant feedback on swing mechanics and shot performance, featuring real-time ball tracking and analysis to help improve consistency. Members and guests can access a variety of iconic PGA golf courses for virtual play, along with training modes for practice. The studio provides a welcoming environment with amenities like a stretch cage, poker room, and a family-friendly atmosphere, suitable for both casual rounds and serious practice sessions. Pricing is primarily membership-based, offering packages with unlimited access to simulators, with options for PGA coaching sessions available at $100 per session.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators provide accurate feedback on every swing
Access to iconic PGA courses without leaving town
Real-time ball tracking and shot analysis for improvement
Family-friendly atmosphere suitable for all skill levels
Convenient online booking system for easy reservations

food_and_drink.notes: No information about food service provided
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided or required to be brought by customers. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for this information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food and drinks, so it's best to check with the venue directly regarding their policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the average time to play 18 holes, which can vary depending on the simulator setup and number of players in a bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee it Up describes itself as having a family-friendly atmosphere, making it suitable for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
